meaning: n.财政,金融,财政学vt.供给...经费,负担经费vi.筹措资金
examples: There remains the problem of finance.
He's the director of the finance section.
Guy Houston quit as Transport Scotland's finance chief after concern over his shares in First Group.
Banker and former Finance Minister Mikhail Zadornov praised Kozlov for his dedication and spotless reputation.
